Idioma.LB_CampoFactorConversion: The conversion factor can not be blank
Idioma.LB_CampoTipoCambio: The exchange rate must be greater than zero
Idioma.LB_CampoTipoCambioMayor0: The exchange rate must be greater than zero
Idioma.LB_CampoReferencia: The reference must not be blank
Idioma.LB_CampoMontoSolicitadoMayor0: The amount requested must be greater than zero
